documents.title: Token rotation incident
documents.content: A synthetic security incident recorded that an integration token was rotated after an alert showed repeated failed validation attempts. The incident owner confirmed the old token was disabled before the follow-up policy review.

documents.title: Alert routing policy
documents.content: The alert routing policy says low severity alerts go to the operations queue, incident alerts go to the security queue, and policy reminders go to team leads each Monday.

documents.title: Policy exception register
documents.content: The policy exception register tracks approved exceptions for temporary access, token naming conventions, and incident review deadlines. It does not describe alert validation failures.

queries.query: which incident says the old token was disabled
where do incident alerts get routed
expectedChunkContains: incident alerts go to the security queue

queries.query: which register tracks approved exceptions for temporary access
